title: Columnea cochinchinensis
intro: Columnea cochinchinensis, also known as the goldfish plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Columnea cochinchinensis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Columnea cochinchinensis is commonly used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues, fever, and skin conditions.
